description_long: This kiosk is a semi-enclosed, open-air structure with a polygonal base and a central circular area featuring a stone-patterned floor. The kiosk is surrounded by several partition walls, each displaying colorful posters, informational panels, and decorative elements such as pastel-colored spheres and green signage. The partitions are arranged to create a walkable perimeter, with open access points for visitors to enter and circulate within the space. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on visual communication and interactive displays. The materials appear to be primarily lightweight panels, possibly composite or plastic, supported by a flat, sturdy platform.
description: A modern, open-air kiosk with partition walls displaying colorful signage and interactive panels, arranged around a central circular stone-patterned area.
description_view_0: From this view, the kiosk's front partition with pastel spheres and a large display panel is prominent, with the central circular area and surrounding informational panels visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the angled arrangement of the partitions, the central stone-patterned area, and the green signage above, with more of the side panels and their displays visible.
description_view_2: Here, the kiosk's rear and side partitions are visible, showing additional informational panels and the open, accessible layout around the central area.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the pastel-colored spheres on the front partition and provides a clear look at the arrangement of the display panels and the open entry points.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs and banners, placed on partition walls and above the kiosk, featuring text and graphics.
attribute_roof_design: none; open-air with no visible roof structure
